Class BeadController

java.lang.Object
scorefour.controller.BeadController
All Implemented Interfaces:
Updatable
public class BeadController extends Object implements Updatable
BeadController manages a beads interactions, updates, and drawing.

It coordinates with a Bead, BeadView, and location information to render and control a bead on a Board.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BeadController(Bead bead, BeadView view, int x, int targetY, int startY)
    Builds a BeadController object which modifies the state of a Bead object, and renders these changes to the BeadView.

    Draws the BeadView

    Checks if the Bead is at the targetY coordinate, if not, update moves the bead closer until it is.

  • Constructor Details

    • BeadController

      public BeadController(Bead bead, BeadView view, int x, int targetY, int startY)
      Builds a BeadController object which modifies the state of a Bead object, and renders these changes to the BeadView.
      Parameters:
      bead - the Bead object to modify
      view - the BeadView to render with
      x - the x coordinate of the bead
      targetY - the target y coordinate for the bead to move towards
      startY - the starting y coordinate of the bead

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update()
      Checks if the Bead is at the targetY coordinate, if not, update moves the bead closer until it is.
      Specified by:
      update in interface Updatable

    • draw

      public void draw(Graphics g)
      Draws the BeadView
      Parameters:
      g - the Graphics context used for rendering
